query: SELECT dp.date, dp.id AS plan_id, dp.dayType, COUNT(sb.id) AS blocks FROM dailyPlans dp LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks sb ON sb.planId = dp.id WHERE dp.date IN ('2026-05-27','2026-05-28') GROUP BY dp.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT dp.date, dp.id AS plan_id, dp.dayType, COUNT(sb.id) AS blocks FROM dailyPlans dp LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks sb ON sb.planId = dp.id WHERE dp.date IN ('2026-05-27','2026-05-28') GROUP BY dp.id;
